– allocate(p): Allocates memory at address p.
– free(p): Frees the memory pointed to by p.
– owns(X, p): Entity X (e.g., caller, global varia
– transfer ownership(X, p): Transfers ownership
– shared(p, n): The reference count of the mem
– F(ϕ) (Eventually): ϕ will hold at some future
– G(ϕ) (Globally): ϕ holds for all future time.
